ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Source__c), ISPICKVAL(Source__c,''), OR( RecordType.Name = 'Distribution Contact', RecordType.Name = 'Support Contact', RecordType.Name = 'Third Party Contact' ), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update Source to a Blank value
